highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.0.0 is the first v3 preview, removing all v2 obsoletes and modernizing the cross-platform foundation.
highlights_body: The entire v2 deprecated API surface has been removed. This series adds WinUI, WPF GL, and Blazor DPI support; introduces LibraryImport/function pointers for faster P/Invoke; brings SKBlender, Skottie animation builder, and new picture APIs; and updates to .NET 8 with broad MAUI and Uno improvements.

breaking.title: All v2 obsolete API members removed
breaking.body: Every member marked [Obsolete] in SkiaSharp 2.x has been removed. Migrate to the v3 replacements before upgrading — the compilation errors will guide you to the new APIs.

bullets.detail: The bundled Skia engine advances to milestone m116, bringing upstream rendering improvements and bug fixes.

bullets.lead: SKBlender and custom blend modes exposed
bullets.detail: SKBlender is now part of the public API, allowing custom blending with SkSL shaders and enabling advanced compositing effects.
The Skottie animation builder API is now available, enabling Lottie-format animation loading and playback via Skia's Skottie library.

bullets.lead: New SKPicture, SKImage, and color filter APIs
bullets.detail: SKPicture gains additional recording and playback APIs; SKImage.ToRawShader is added; and spans are added to color filter factory methods.
Compatibility overloads for SKFilterQuality are added so existing code compiles cleanly during migration.
SetRectRadii gains Span overloads for working with rounded-rect radii without allocations.

bullets.lead: SKTextBlobBuilder and SKRunBuffer APIs cleaned up
bullets.detail: SKTextBlobBuilder and SKRunBuffer have been modernized, removing legacy text-based blob APIs where only glyph-ID paths remain.
SKBitmap.GetPixelSpan gains offset parameters for accessing pixel data at a specific location.
Converting a floating-point rect to integer now floors outwards in all four directions as expected.

bullets.lead: AccessViolationException when disposing cloned SKPaint fixed
bullets.detail: Disposing a cloned SKPaint was causing an access violation; the native ownership tracking is now correct.

bullets.lead: Memory leaks in MAUI views fixed
bullets.detail: Several native handle leaks in the MAUI SKCanvasView and SKGLView have been resolved.

bullets.lead: Metal Snapshot returning magenta on Apple platforms fixed
bullets.detail: SKSurface.Snapshot was returning a magenta image when the Metal backend was in use; the colour space handling is now correct.
SKTypeface.GetKerningPairAdjustments was returning incorrect values due to a wrong native call signature; this is now corrected.

bullets.lead: Uno and WASM canvas rendering fixes
bullets.detail: The Uno Skia canvas now ensures its GL context is active when rendering, the WASM canvas handles missing elements gracefully, and XamlCanvas on Uno uses the correct Bgra8888 format.
SKXamlCanvas no longer throws a NullReferenceException when XamlRoot is null during unload.

bullets.lead: SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions reverted to 2.88.8 behaviour
bullets.detail: A behaviour change introduced in early v3 previews for SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions has been reverted to match the 2.88.x behaviour.

bullets.lead: LibraryImport and function pointers for faster P/Invoke
bullets.detail: The native interop layer switches to LibraryImport source generators and function pointers, reducing managed-to-native call overhead and improving AoT compatibility.
The IBufferByteAccess COM interface implementation is updated to work correctly under Native AoT compilation.
Hardware-accelerated SKCanvasView and SKGLView are now available for WinUI 3 (Windows App SDK) applications.
SKGLElement provides an OpenGL-accelerated canvas for WPF applications.
Blazor canvas components now expose the device pixel ratio, enabling correct high-DPI rendering in browser applications.

bullets.lead: Metal backend used on Mac Catalyst
bullets.detail: Mac Catalyst applications now use the Metal rendering backend by default for better performance and compatibility.
ANGLE (Almost Native Graphics Layer Engine) is now available in NuGet packages for Windows platforms.
Platform configuration APIs are now compatible with .NET trimming, reducing app size for published applications.
SKXamlCanvas no longer uses async void for event handlers, preventing unobserved exception swallowing.

bullets.lead: WinForms updated to new GLControl packages
bullets.detail: SkiaSharp.Views.WindowsForms is updated to use the current OpenTK GLControl NuGet packages.
Non-SIMD WebAssembly builds are restored for environments requiring edge-enhanced security or Safari compatibility.
HarfBuzz updated to 8.3.0 (from 7.3.0), WebP to 1.3.2, libjpeg-turbo to 3.0.0 (later rolled back to 2.1.5.1), and .NET updated to 8.0.

contributor_summaries.jeromelaban: Uno platform rendering fixes including canvas context activation, XamlRoot null handling, and WASM canvas stability
contributor_summaries.maxkatz6: PlatformConfiguration trimming support, async void removal from SKXamlCanvas, and HarfBuzz function-pointer P/Invoke
contributor_summaries.Youssef1313: SKFilterQuality compatibility overloads, Span overloads for SetRectRadii, and Bgra8888 fix for Uno Skia
contributor_summaries.beto-rodriguez: Blazor DPI support for canvas components
contributor_summaries.jeremy-visionaid: Fixed the AccessViolationException when disposing a cloned SKPaint
contributor_summaries.lindexi: Avoided async void in SKXamlCanvas event handlers
contributor_summaries.sungaila: Reverted SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions to 2.88.8 behaviour
contributor_summaries.taublast: Fixed SKXamlCanvas when XamlRoot is null during unload

preview_summaries.v3.0.0-preview.5.4: Preview 5 stabilized the release with SKBitmap.Encode revert, LibraryImport/function pointers, SKFilterQuality compat overloads, .NET 8 update, ANGLE support, and Span overloads.
preview_summaries.v3.0.0-preview.4.1: Preview 4 fixed the SKPaint dispose AVE, MAUI memory leaks, Uno/WASM canvas bugs, XamlRoot null reference, and added SKBlender and expanded SKPicture APIs.
preview_summaries.v3.0.0-preview.3.1: Preview 3 added Metal Mac Catalyst backend, WPF SKGLElement, and Metal Snapshot colour correction.
preview_summaries.v3.0.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 introduced the Skottie animation builder, Metal on Mac Catalyst, SKImage.ToRawShader, and MSVC build support.
preview_summaries.v3.0.0-preview.1.8: Preview 1 established the v3 foundation: WinUI and WPF views, SKGLView, Blazor DPI, LibraryImport groundwork, HarfBuzz 8.3.0, WebP 1.3.2, and removal of all v2 obsoletes.

harfbuzz_summary: Ships HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0 with the v3 foundation updates including LibraryImport P/Invoke, .NET 8 upgrade, and the new platform support from this series.
